Grid.TextBlock:
1. (기밀) 상황: Our forces are en route Attu Island attempting to seize the island to gain a strategic advantage in the ongoing peace talks between the Warsaw Pact and NATO. We assess that NATO knows our forces left Kamchatka, but inclement weather has prevented our location being detected for several days. However, as we approach Attu, expect to be quickly located and attacked by air and surface forces. Prepare your forces and proceed to the Invasion Force Launch Point.
2. (기밀) 목표: 2.1 Deliver your escorts to the launch point. 2.2 Destroy all NATO forces as able.
3. (기밀) 실행: 3.1 EMCON policy at your discretion. Recommend air search RADAR to prevent surprise air attack. 3.2 Reconnaissance and Defensive Counter Air are under your direct control.
4. (기밀) 적 전투서열: 4.1 SAG 알파 4.1.1 3x 페가수스급 미사일 고속정 4.2 TF 75.3 4.2.1 UNK - Potential surge from Hawaii 4.3 공군 4.3.1 Multiple F-14s missing from imagery 4.3.2 Multiple A-6s and A-7s missing from imagery
5. (기밀) 아군 전투서열: 5.1 보스토크 태스크포스 5.1.1 소브레멘니 EM-680 5.1.2 슬라바 RKR-103 5.1.3 아드미랄 이사첸코프 BPK-686 5.2 Invasion Force 5.2.1 소브레멘니 EM-678 5.2.2 카라 BPK-591 5.2.3 크레스타 II BPK-690 5.2.4 2x 상륙 부대 5.3 공군 5.3.1 Tu-95RT Reconaissance Plane 5.3.2 4x MIG-25PD 요격기
6. (기밀) INTEL ASSESSMENT: 6.1 Assess with medium confidence that NATO will surge surface forces from TF 75.3 north. 6.2 Assess with high confidence that NATO aircraft will support the defense. 6.3 Assess with high confidence that NATO SAG Alpha is underway from Attu.
